zh.Ford Place, Stopham, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可斯托福哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Atte Ford於1295年出生在英國英格蘭肯特萊坦時，他的父親Sir Henry Forde26歲，母親Juliana Atwood21歲。他於大約1320年與Juliana Wode在英國肯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1350年在他的家鄉享年55歲。

zh-hans.Ford Place, Stopham, Sussex, England: 英国英格兰素可斯托福哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Atte Ford于1295年出生在英国英格兰肯特萊坦时，他的父亲Sir Henry Forde26岁，母亲Juliana Atwood21岁。他于大约1320年与Juliana Wode在英国肯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1350年在他的家乡享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived near a ford (Middle English, Old English ford), or a habitational name from one of the many places called with this word, such as Ford (Durham, Herefordshire, Northumberland, Shropshire, Sussex), Ford in Sefton (Lancashire), Ford in Crediton and Ford in Holcombe Rogus (both Devon), Ford in Litton and Ford in Wiveliscombe (both Somerset).

Irish: Anglicized form (quasi-translation) of various Gaelic names, for example MacGiolla na Naomh ‘son of Gilla na Naomh’ (a personal name meaning ‘servant of the saints’), Mac Conshámha ‘son of Conshnámha’ (a personal name composed of the elements con ‘dog’ + snámh ‘to swim’), in all of which the final syllable was wrongly thought to be áth ‘ford’, and Ó Fuar(th)áin (see Foran ).

variants.name: Forth
meanings: German: topographic name for someone who lived by a ford, Middle High German vort, vurt, Middle Low German vorde ‘ford, entrance way’, or a habitational name from a place in Franconia or in former Pomerania (now Poland) named Forth.

variants.name: Forde
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Declan, Dermot, Aine, Fionnuala, Liam, Nuala.
English and Irish: variant of   Ford   1 and 2. This is a very common spelling in Ireland.
Norwegian (Førde): habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads named Førde (there are eleven on the west coast), from Old Norse fyrthi, dative of fjǫrthr ‘fjord’.

variants.name: Foran
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fuartháin ‘descendant of Fuarthán’, a personal name derived from fuar ‘cold’. The word fuarán also means ‘spring’ or ‘pool’. The form Fuarthán was understood as fuarathán ‘cold little ford’, and the name has thus sometimes been translated into English as Ford .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Atte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which was derived in the medieval period from the Old English personal name Tāta.

en.lifeSummary: When William Atte Ford was born in 1295, in Wrotham, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Henry Forde, was 26 and his mother, Juliana Atwood, was 21. He married Juliana Wode about 1320, in Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1350, in his hometown, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Atte Ford est né en 1295, à Wrotham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Henry Forde, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Juliana Atwood, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Juliana Wode environ 1320, à Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1350, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Atte Ford 1295 in Wrotham, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry Forde 26 und seine Mutter Juliana Atwood 21. Er hat um 1320 in Kent, England Juliana Wode geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1350 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Atte Ford è nato il nel 1295 nel Wrotham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Henry Forde, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Juliana Atwood, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Juliana Wode circa 1320, nel Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1350, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: William Atte Ford(이)가 1295년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 로섬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry Forde(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana Atwood(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1320년 영국 켄트에서 Juliana Wode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1350년 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Atte Ford nasceu em 1295, em Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Henry Forde, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Juliana Atwood, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Juliana Wode aproximadamente 1320, em Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1350, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Atte Ford родился в 1295 г. в местности ротам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Henry Forde было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Juliana Atwood, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliana Wode около 1320 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1350 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Atte Ford nació en 1295, en Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Henry Forde, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Juliana Atwood, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Juliana Wode aproximadamente 1320, en Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1350, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años.
